STUDEX MEAT
Premium Halal Meat — Farm to Table
studexmeat.com · South Africa · 2026
About Us

FROM THE FARM
TO YOUR DOOR

Studex Meat is South Africa's premium online butchery — sourcing heritage and luxury breeds directly from verified farms and delivering to homes and businesses across the country.

Our difference: full provenance transparency. Every cut shows the farm, the animal age, and the slaughter date. Customers know exactly what they're buying.
100%
Halal Certified
3
Supplier Farms
2
Delivery Partners
Our Products

PREMIUM BREEDS

From slow-cured Wagyu biltong to heritage lamb chops — every product is traceable, premium, and professionally packed.

Wagyu Biltong Gold

Premium grade A5 Wagyu beef, dry-aged and slow-cured in the traditional South African biltong style.

ProductOriginPrice

Drought-resistant, native to Southern Africa, intensely flavoured lean beef from natural savannah-reared cattle.

VERIFIED SOURCES

Direct relationships with farms and suppliers — no middlemen, full transparency, consistent quality.

All deliveries include real-time WhatsApp tracking updates. Orders assigned to optimal partner by routing zone.
Why Studex

THE DIFFERENCE

  • 100% Halal certified — every product, every supplier
  • Farm provenance on every product page
  • Same-day delivery in Gauteng
  • Dry-aged & premium cuts unavailable in retail stores
  • Direct farm relationships — no middlemen markup
  • Online ordering with real-time delivery scheduling
  • AI-powered order management (Charlie orchestrator)
  • Post-delivery automated review requests
R14k+
Monthly Revenue
100%
Client Satisfaction Target
24/7
AI Agent Coverage
How It Works

THE PIPELINE

A fully AI-orchestrated farm-to-door operation — from order receipt to delivery confirmation.

  1. Customer places order at studexmeat.com — Shopify storefront with live inventory
  2. Charlie AI assigns delivery and fulfilment automatically
  3. Product sourced from Moutloe Farm or our supplier network
  4. Packed and dispatched via Dinkoko or My Courier based on routing zone
  5. WhatsApp updates at every stage — confirmed, dispatched, delivered
  6. Automated review request sent 24 hours post-delivery
The Opportunity

MARKET REALITY

South Africa's premium meat e-commerce market is growing rapidly. Studex is positioned to be the leading online specialist for heritage and luxury breeds in Southern Africa.

Studex is positioned to be the leading online specialist for heritage and luxury breeds in Southern Africa.

Market Tailwinds

  • Rising middle class demand for premium food
  • Farm-to-table transparency trends
  • Shift to online grocery accelerated by convenience
  • African luxury meat market growing to 2034

Strategic Focus Areas

  • Wagyu and Ankole premium positioning
  • Corporate and hospitality bulk supply
  • B2B restaurant and hotel partnerships
  • National delivery expansion

Agent Infrastructure

  • Charlie — AI Operations Orchestrator
  • Naledi — Content & Marketing Agent
  • Delivery Agent — 15-minute order cycle
  • Robusca — CEO Agent
